name: Messenger
description: Send and receive messages via Telegram, WhatsApp, and Discord. Route messages to the right platform using natural language commands.

commands.send_message: Sends a text message to a contact or channel on the specified platform.
commands.list_accounts: Lists all connected and configured messaging accounts and their status.
commands.check_connection: Checks the connectivity status of one or all configured messaging providers.

function.name: MESSENGER__send_message
function.description: Sends a text message to a contact or group on a specified messaging platform. Supported platforms: 'telegram', 'whatsapp', 'discord'. Use this when the user says 'manda un messaggio', 'send a message', 'scrivi a', 'write to', 'message on telegram/whatsapp/discord'. The 'to' field must include the platform prefix, e.g.: 'telegram:@username', 'telegram:123456789', 'discord:#channel-name', 'whatsapp:+393331234567'.

to.description: The recipient, including platform prefix. Examples: 'telegram:@myuser', 'telegram:123456789', 'whatsapp:+393331234567', 'discord:#general'. If the user does not specify a platform and only one is configured, default to that one.

text.description: The message body to send. Can be a single line or multi-line text. Preserve formatting if the user specifies it.

platform.description: Optional: explicit platform override ('telegram', 'whatsapp', 'discord'). Use this if the 'to' field does not contain a prefix.

function.name: MESSENGER__list_accounts
function.description: Returns the list of all configured messaging accounts with their status (connected, disabled, error). Use this when the user asks 'which messaging accounts do I have?', 'quali account ho configurato?', 'show messenger status'.

function.name: MESSENGER__check_connection
function.description: Tests the connection to one or all configured messaging providers and returns the live status. Use this when the user says 'check messenger', 'testa la connessione', 'is telegram connected?'.

platform.description: Optional: which platform to test ('telegram', 'whatsapp', 'discord'). If omitted, all configured providers are tested.
